/usr/bin/ar qc libaegis_storage.a CMakeFiles/aegis_storage.dir/src/storage/pager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/aegis_storage.dir/src/storage/buffer_pool.cpp.o CMakeFiles/aegis_storage.dir/src/storage/table_heap.cpp.o CMakeFiles/aegis_storage.dir/src/storage/index/b_plus_tree.cpp.o CMakeFiles/aegis_storage.dir/src/storage/index/b_plus_tree_leaf_page.cpp.o CMakeFiles/aegis_storage.dir/src/storage/index/b_plus_tree_internal_page.cpp.o CMakeFiles/aegis_storage.dir/src/storage/tuple.cpp.o CMakeFiles/aegis_storage.dir/src/storage/table_page.cpp.o CMakeFiles/aegis_storage.dir/src/type/value.cpp.o CMakeFiles/aegis_storage.dir/src/storage/index/index_iterator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/aegis_storage.dir/src/recovery/log_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/aegis_storage.dir/src/recovery/log_recovery.cpp.o CMakeFiles/aegis_storage.dir/src/storage/storage_engine.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libaegis_storage.a
